case_title: DAVE GOMBERG VS. HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC'S MOTION TO DISMISS. (FOR HEARING DATE: OCTOBER 6, 2014 AT 5:30PM) DOCUMENT STAMPED:"FILED BY FAX) FILED BY DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GOMBERG, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED AUG-25-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HEALTH NET OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER DEFENDANT. "PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS PREEMPTED BY FEDERAL LAW. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
